date_notes: Auditor General report released 2025. Handoff carried a 2024-09-24 date that appears to be an error — Global News coverage surfaced November 2025. AG report publication date must be confirmed at oag.ab.ca.
title_en: Kenney captured on recording coordinating UCP leadership review strategy with staff
title_fr: Le vérificateur général confirme une perte d'environ 109 M$ dans l'affaire de la privatisation des laboratoires
description_en: A recording surfaces in which Premier Kenney is heard coordinating with staff and loyalists on how to manage the UCP internal leadership review — inconsistent with his government's stated governance norms around confidentiality of internal deliberations. The recording was made by a third party and released without Kenney's knowledge or consent; that context is noted here and is relevant to how the material was obtained. The content of the recording revealed internal political strategy discussions. Source URL under verification: cbc.ca/news/canada/calgary/kenney-recording-ucp-alberta-leadership-review-staff-1.6396647

opposition_response.name: David Shepherd
opposition_response.description: Official Opposition health critic challenged the government in Question Period over poor documentation and transparency following the Auditor General report.

relations.note: Carry-forward from related_events — confirm relation type

verification_notes: $109M taxpayer-cost finding verified against R-007 (Global News). RECOMMENDED: attach oag.ab.ca AG report (Tier 1) as corroborating primary before final publication; figure itself is confirmed. $109M supersedes earlier $97M project estimate.

update_log.note: Language corrected: 'secretly recorded' replaced with 'captured on recording' to accurately reflect that Kenney was recorded by a third party, not that he did the recording. Recording context (third-party, without consent) added to description.
